narrative:
Precinct Bantam Ridge (precinct in Jefferson County) has 1,102 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
